document.title: Letter of Request for extension of Technical documents supplementation period

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. requested an extension of the supplementation period for CE MDDR Technical Documents 1st review items.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Request letter to 3EC International a.s. for extending the supplementary period for further review of the common part with the Clinical Evaluation supplement.
keyPoints: Technical Documentation Assessment Report No. MDR199_2023 is identified.
The 1st NB assessment date is August 31, 2023.
The deadline for request for supplemental extension is October 31, 2023.
The request concerns extension of the supplementary period for further review of the common part with the Clinical Evaluation supplement.
The letter is signed by Yunhee Kim, President, on behalf of H&abyz Co., Ltd.
